title: Jamaican Cherry Crumble
description: A warm and comforting dessert featuring a rich jamaican-inspired cherry filling topped with a crunchy crumble.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine cherries, brown sugar, flour, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Let it sit for 15 minutes.
Roll out puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the pastry to a 9x9 inch baking dish, trimming any excess pastry.
Pour the cherry mixture into the pastry-lined baking dish.
In a small bowl, mix together the crumble mixture. Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the filling.
Dot the top of the crumble with the melted butter.
Bake for 40-45 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown and the crumble is crispy.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream if desired.
